tasks.name: validate-secrets
tasks.description: Validar LITELLM_MASTER_KEY, GROQ_API_KEY, MINIMAX_API_KEY existem em .env — não imprimir valores

tasks.name: fix-litellm-postgres-host
tasks.description: Corrigir DATABASE_URL do LiteLLM: host deve ser zappro-litellm-db:5432, não localhost:5432. Verificar docker-compose.litellm.yml e .env

tasks.name: start-edge-tts
tasks.description: Edge TTS (zappro-edge-tts) já está em 8012. Testar /v1/audio/speech com curl e gerar mp3 de teste em /tmp/

tasks.name: start-full-compose
tasks.description: Executar docker compose -f docker-compose.openwebui-hvac.yml up -d para subir todos os containers. Validar healthchecks.

tasks.name: validate-multimodal-stack
tasks.description: Validar stack completo: curl /v1/models mostra só zappro-clima-tutor, chat funciona via MiniMax, healthcheck 12/12
